Los Angeles County Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

20 senior living communities in the Los Angeles County region of California, organized by city.

How California regulates senior care

Assisted living and residential care homes are licensed as RCFEs by the Community Care Licensing Division; skilled nursing facilities are certified by CMS and licensed by the California Department of Public Health. License & inspection lookup: California Department of Social Services, Community Care Licensing Division.

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and the touring checklist.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
